description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a vibrant orange exterior with playful pill-shaped graphics and the title 'PILL SPILL' displayed in colorful, bubble-like letters on the marquee. The front panel includes a large rectangular screen area, a control panel with two buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot below. The side panels are decorated with whimsical pill illustrations in red, blue, and white, along with the initials 'P' and 'S' in matching pill motifs. The back of the cabinet is solid black with ventilation grilles and access panels, typical for maintenance. The cabinet has a classic upright form, with a slightly angled screen and control area for ergonomic gameplay. The overall design is eye-catching and clearly intended to attract attention in an urban entertainment setting.
description: A colorful upright arcade game cabinet with pill-themed graphics, a marquee reading 'PILL SPILL', and a classic control panel with buttons and joystick.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange panel with pill graphics and 'P' and 'S' pill motifs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with ventilation grilles and access panels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring pill graphics and the 'P' and 'S' motifs.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen area is flat and rectangular, but display technology is not visually identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two round buttons, spaced apart, with a simple color scheme matching the cabinet's theme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'PILL SPILL' in large, colorful, bubble-style letters with a playful, candy-like theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels are decorated with multiple pill-shaped graphics in red, blue, and white, along with 'P' and 'S' pill motifs, creating a playful and thematic design.
